meta.name: S-Coin Comment Templates - Bukit Ubi Mixed Natural Set
meta.description: 300 unique customer-editable S-Coin review helper templates for Grand Senheng Bukit Ubi: 150 earn comments and 150 redeem comments. Written in casual Malaysian Malay, Manglish, and some full English while keeping placeholders compatible with the Review Helper HTML.
meta.recommended_use: Use as a starting point only. Customers should edit the review based on their real shopping experience and choose an honest rating.

earn: {item}
{price}
{percent}
{netValue}
redeem: {item}
{points}
{value}

notes: Earn comments mention the item, price, S-Coin cashback percentage, and net S-Coin value.
Redeem comments mention the item, S-Coin used, and redemption value.
Do not add RM before {price}, {netValue}, or {value} in the app if those values are already formatted with RM.
Templates are intentionally mixed in BM, Manglish, and simple English for a more natural review feel.

earn: Saya beli {item} harga {price} dan dapat S-Coin cashback {percent} bernilai {netValue}. Tak rasa macam beli kosong-kosong, sebab ada value yang boleh dibawa ke pembelian seterusnya.
Just bought {item} for {price}. The {percent} S-Coin cashback worth {netValue} is a nice touch, especially when you know you can use it again later.
Beli {item} hari ni, harga {price}. Bila staf tunjuk S-Coin cashback {percent} nilai {netValue}, baru rasa deal ni lagi masuk akal.
Untuk {item} harga {price}, saya rasa pembelian ni okay. Tambah pula dapat cashback S-Coin {percent} bernilai {netValue}, memang ada rasa extra benefit.
